indications.text:
CIPRODEX® is indicated for the treatment of infections caused by susceptible isolates of the designated microorganisms
in the specific conditions listed below:
• Acute Otitis Media (AOM) in pediatric patients (age 6 months and older) with tympanostomy tubes due to
Staphylococcus aureus, Streptococcu...
